title: eremophila vernicosa
intro: Eremophila vernicosa, also known as the "Native Emu Bush," is a flowering plant native to Australia, belonging to the family Scrophulariaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Australian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Eremophila vernicosa include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, which can be taken internally or applied topically to utilize its medicinal properties.
